methodology.name: Walk-Forward Validation
methodology.description_en: Train on past 3 months, select best Sharpe combo from 25 parameter sets, test on the next unseen month. Repeat across 40 rolling windows. This prevents overfitting by never evaluating on training data.
methodology.description_zh: 使用过去3个月数据训练，从25组参数中选择Sharpe最优组合，在下一个月的未见数据上测试。滚动40个窗口重复验证。通过从不在训练数据上评估来防止过拟合。

adaptive.description_en: Walk-forward adaptive: re-select best params each month based on trailing 3-month Sharpe
adaptive.description_zh: 自适应Walk-Forward：每月根据过去3个月Sharpe重新选择最优参数

fixed_best.description_en: Production-locked params (Top-3, HB=0) from V4 PIT Walk-Forward: avg OOS Sharpe 1.70, 5/5 windows positive
fixed_best.description_zh: 生产锁定参数（Top-3, HB=0），来自V4 PIT Walk-Forward验证：avg OOS 1.70，5/5窗口全正

stress_test.note_en: Scenario stress test only (no PIT restriction). GHA-verified PIT-corrected annual Walk-Forward result: +0.2%, Sharpe=0.00. The 2023 rally was dominated by Magnificent 7 and post-Jan-2023 IPOs (ARM, CAVA, etc.) which were outside the tradeable universe under strict PIT rules.
stress_test.note_zh: 仅为情景压力测试（无PIT时间点限制）。GitHub Actions验证的PIT修正年度WF实际结果：+0.2%，夏普=0.00。2023年涨幅由Magnificent 7及当年新上市IPO（ARM、CAVA等）高度垄断，在严格PIT规则下这些标的不在可交易范围内。

parameter_stability.TOP_N_consensus: 3 (locked via V4 PIT-WF: avg OOS 1.70, 5/5 windows positive; V5 monthly WF: 6 led 14/40 but 3 close at 11/40)
parameter_stability.HB_consensus: 0 (chosen in 20/40 months — low inertia preferred; confirmed by V4 PIT-WF 5/6 windows)

annual_wf_windows.description_en: 5-window annual Walk-Forward (PIT-corrected, 2018-2024). Each window trains on all prior years, tests on the following year. Universe filtered by Point-in-Time snapshot to eliminate survivorship bias.
annual_wf_windows.description_zh: 5窗口年度Walk-Forward（PIT修正，2018-2024）。每窗口以之前所有年份训练，在下一年测试。使用时间点宇宙快照过滤，消除幸存者偏差。

windows.name: W4
windows.note_en: 2023 OOS Sharpe=0.00 under PIT-corrected conditions. The 2023 bull market was driven by Magnificent 7 and post-Jan-2023 IPOs (ARM, CAVA, CART, BIRK etc.) — none of which existed in the tradeable universe at test start. This is the honest PIT-corrected result, not a strategy failure per se. Direct backtest without PIT correction yields Sharpe=1.38.
windows.note_zh: PIT修正条件下2023年OOS Sharpe=0.00。2023年牛市由Magnificent 7及2023年后上市的新股（ARM、CAVA、CART、BIRK等）驱动——这些标的在测试起点（2023年1月）均不在可交易范围内。此为PIT修正后的真实表现，非策略本身失效。不含PIT修正的直接回测Sharpe=1.38。

summary.note_en: W4 (2023) excluded from average would give avg OOS Sharpe=2.13. Included as-is per honest reporting.
summary.note_zh: 若排除W4（2023）则平均OOS Sharpe=2.13。按诚实原则保留原值。

bias_corrections.detail: Skip stocks with 20-day avg volume < 500K shares
Execute at next day's open price, not signal day's close
OOS tests restricted to tickers listed at test-period start date, eliminating look-ahead bias from post-period IPOs (e.g. ARM, CAVA, CART listed after Jan 2023)
